skills.name: Plan: Break Goals
prompt_fragments: Decompose the goal into steps with owners and estimates.

skills.name: Plan: Sprint Backlog
prompt_fragments: Generate a sprint backlog with priorities and acceptance criteria.

skills.name: Plan: Roadmap
prompt_fragments: Produce a 6-12 month roadmap aligned to objectives.

skills.name: Code: Generate Function
skills.purpose: Generate a language function from spec
prompt_fragments: Write the requested function with comments and unit tests.

skills.name: Code: Review PR
prompt_fragments: Provide code review comments and suggest improvements.

skills.name: Code: Bug Fix Suggestion
skills.purpose: Suggest probable fixes for given bug description
prompt_fragments: Analyze the error and propose a minimal safe fix.

skills.name: Debug: Reproduce Steps
skills.purpose: Ask clarifying questions to reproduce a bug
prompt_fragments: List targeted questions to reproduce the reported issue.

skills.name: Debug: Stack Trace Analyzer
skills.purpose: Analyze stack traces and point to likely source
prompt_fragments: Given a stack trace, identify likely problematic code locations.

skills.name: Arch: API Design
prompt_fragments: Design a REST/GraphQL API with example requests and responses.

skills.name: Research: Quick Lit Review
prompt_fragments: Provide a concise literature review with citations and uncertainties.

skills.name: Retrieval: KB Search
skills.purpose: Search local KB for relevant passages
prompt_fragments: Return top relevant passages and sources.

skills.name: Summarize: Multi-paragraph
prompt_fragments: Summarize the provided text into 3-5 sentences.

skills.name: Memory: Summarize Conversation
skills.purpose: Produce a conversation summary for memory write
prompt_fragments: Create a concise conversation summary suitable for memory storage.

skills.name: Persona: Tone Adjust
prompt_fragments: Modify prompt to match requested tone and brevity.

skills.name: Metacog: Risk Detector
skills.purpose: Detect risk-sensitive content and advise M1 critic
prompt_fragments: Assess risk and indicate whether M1 critic is required.

skills.name: Eval: Simple QA Test
skills.purpose: Create QA checks for output correctness
prompt_fragments: Produce pass/fail checks and scoring for the provided output.

skills.name: Routing: Provider Selector
prompt_fragments: Score providers by task fit, latency preference, and persona.

skills.name: Safety: Redaction Helper
prompt_fragments: Identify and redact sensitive fields and produce redaction report.

skills.name: Reflection: Critique Output
prompt_fragments: Evaluate the output and return actionable improvements.

skills.name: Invention: Idea Suggester
prompt_fragments: Generate novel ideas and pragmatic next steps.

skills.name: Evidence: Receipt Generator
skills.purpose: Create structured evidence receipts for events
prompt_fragments: Generate structured receipt JSON with required fields.

skills.name: Docs: API Quickstart
prompt_fragments: Produce a short quickstart guide with code snippets.

skills.name: Prompt: Cleanse Input
skills.purpose: Sanitize and normalize user input before compilation
prompt_fragments: Normalize punctuation, remove problematic markup, and redact secrets.

skills.name: Fallback: Explain Fallback
skills.purpose: Explain to user why fallback was used
prompt_fragments: Explain why primary providers failed and what was used instead.

skills.name: Model Hygiene: Prompt Check
skills.purpose: Detect prompt issues like injection patterns
prompt_fragments: Detect prompt injection patterns and produce a safe variant.

skills.name: Metrics: Summarize Metrics
skills.purpose: Summarize recent metrics into key insights
prompt_fragments: Summarize last 24h metrics and flag anomalies.

skills.name: Test: Unit Test Template
skills.purpose: Generate unit test scaffold for given code
prompt_fragments: Produce unit tests with edge cases and mocks.

skills.name: KG: Entity Linker
skills.purpose: Link entities and suggest backlinks for vault
prompt_fragments: Identify entities and suggest backlinks with confidence scores.

skills.name: Obsidian: Note Linker
skills.purpose: Create backlinkable notes suitable for vault
prompt_fragments: Generate a small vault note with tags and backlinks.

skills.name: Workflow: Orchestrate Steps
skills.purpose: Turn tasks into an orchestrated workflow
prompt_fragments: Create an orchestrated workflow with retries and dependencies.

skills.name: Quality Gate: Sanity Checks
prompt_fragments: Run a set of sanity checks to assert output quality.

skills.name: Evidence: Trace Correlator
skills.purpose: Correlate traces and receipts for an event
prompt_fragments: Given receipts and traces, correlate related events.

skills.name: Model: Token Cost Estimator
prompt_fragments: Estimate token usage for the compiled prompt and expected output length.

skills.name: Safety: Policy Checker
prompt_fragments: Run policy checks and categorize violations.

skills.name: Retrieval: Semantic Rerank
prompt_fragments: Rerank the candidate passages by semantic fit to the query.

skills.name: Reflection: Bias Detector
prompt_fragments: Identify potential biases and suggest mitigation.

skills.name: Docs: API Changelog
prompt_fragments: Create concise changelog entries from commit messages.

skills.name: Testing: Integration Test Plan
prompt_fragments: Create an integration test plan covering key flows.

skills.name: KG: Tag Extractor
skills.purpose: Extract tags and metadata from text
prompt_fragments: Extract concise tags and suggested categories.

skills.name: Misc: Short Answer Formatter
prompt_fragments: Return a 1-2 sentence concise answer.

skills.name: Misc: Expand Bullet Points
prompt_fragments: Turn bullets into a clear paragraph.

skills.name: Misc: Translate Short
prompt_fragments: Translate the text into the requested language.

skills.name: Misc: Title Generator
prompt_fragments: Produce a title under 8 words.

skills.name: Misc: Expand Acronyms
prompt_fragments: Expand acronyms and give short definitions.
